workplan: Build Agent 3: Provider Ranking. Score and order providers using weighted criteria: rating (40%), reviews (20%), price match (25%), availability (15%).
tasks_completed: Created ranking_agent with 4-criteria weighted scoring instruction
rank_providers() passes intent + matched providers to LLM
Output includes rank, overall_score, ranking_breakdown per criterion, recommendation text
Returns top_recommendation provider_id for downstream agents
decisions_made: Fallback: return unranked matched_providers if LLM parse fails
outcome: Ranking agent scored Bilal Ahmad at 9.56/10 as top provider during pipeline test.
